title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 527.130 - "Person" defined
text:
527.130.  "Person" defined. — The word "person", wherever used in sections 527.010 to 527.130, shall be construed to mean any person, including a minor represented by next friend or guardian ad litem and any other person under disability lawfully represented, partnership, joint-stock company, corporation, unincorporated association or society or municipal or other corporation of any character whatsoever.
(RSMo 1939 § 1138)
